allow: Bash(COREPACK_ENABLE_STRICT=0 npx pnpm@10.4.1 --dir apps/web test -- stream)
Bash(BACKEND_HMAC_SECRET=test ~/.local/bin/uv run python -c "from saas_forge_backend.observability.logging import configure_logging; configure_logging\(\); print\('ok'\)")

Bash(BACKEND_HMAC_SECRET=test DATABASE_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://x:x@localhost/x REDIS_URL=redis://localhost ~/.local/bin/uv run python -c "from saas_forge_backend.main import create_app; create_app\(\); print\('ok'\)")
Bash(REDIS_PORT=6380 BACKEND_PORT=8001 POSTGRES_PORT=5434 docker compose up --detach postgres redis backend-api)
Bash(REDIS_PORT=6380 BACKEND_PORT=8001 POSTGRES_PORT=5434 docker compose logs backend-api)

Bash(REDIS_PORT=6380 BACKEND_PORT=8001 POSTGRES_PORT=5434 docker compose run --rm --entrypoint "" backend-api bash -c "cd /app/apps/backend && ls -la && ls .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/ | grep saas")

Bash(REDIS_PORT=6380 BACKEND_PORT=8001 POSTGRES_PORT=5434 docker compose run --rm --entrypoint "" backend-api bash -c "ls /app/apps/backend/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/saas_forge_backend/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'NOT FOUND'")
